description: Fix Pomodoro FocusMode: add duration selection screen before timer starts, fix invisible timer text, and make ambient audio work using Web Audio API
steps: In frontend/components/FocusMode.tsx, add a new 'selecting' phase state that is the initial state when `active` becomes true. Show a pre-start screen with duration buttons (25 min, 45 min, 60 min, 90 min). Timer does NOT start until user clicks a duration button. Only after selection, transition to 'focus' phase and start the countdown.

Fix the timer text color: change from text-[#fef3c7] (light amber/yellow that is invisible) to a high-contrast off-white like text-[#f0f0f2] or text-white/90. Apply the same fix to the 'Break complete!' text and any other text using amber/yellow in the timer display.

Replace the AMBIENT_URLS approach (external URLs that may not load) with Web Audio API sound generation. For 'rain' - generate white noise through a bandpass filter. For 'cafe' - generate brownian/brown noise. For 'lofi' - generate filtered pink noise with gentle LFO oscillation. Create a reusable AudioContext-based system that works without external URLs. Keep the volume slider functional.
Ensure the settings gear icon still works for further customization but it should NOT be the primary way to select duration - the pre-start screen should be the primary entry point.
The timer should remain paused/not-running until the user explicitly selects a duration and confirms start.
acceptance_criteria: When FocusMode activates, user sees duration selection buttons (25, 45, 60, 90 min) and timer is NOT running
Timer only starts after user clicks a duration button
Timer text is clearly visible (high-contrast white/cream on dark background)
Ambient audio plays using Web Audio API without external URL dependencies
Volume slider controls Web Audio API gain node
npm run build passes without errors
findings: Build passes cleanly. All three bugs fixed in a single commit: (1) selecting phase prevents auto-start, (2) text color changed to #f0f0f2, (3) Web Audio API replaces external URLs with noise buffer generators and filter chains.
